name: @otrust/opensource
description: Self-hostable OTRUST server, web UI, SDKs, CLI tools, cryptographic helpers, and examples.
author: Kris Ledel <kris@otrust.eu>

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @otrust/sdk && npm run build --workspace @otrust/react
scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test --workspace @otrust/sdk && npm run test --workspace @otrust/react
scripts.test:server: node --input-type=module -e "process.env.NODE_ENV='test'; const { startServer } = await import('./src/server.js'); const server = await startServer(0); const port = server.address().port; const res = await fetch('http://127.0.0.1:' + port + '/health'); console.log(res.status); await new Promise(resolve => server.close(resolve)); if (!res.ok) process.exit(1);"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @otrust/sdk && npm run typecheck --workspace @otrust/react
